testcase.name: test_update_master_sku_standard_price_and_credit

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0.0 == 120.0 + where 0.0 = float((None or 0)) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf90a0e1954c0>('standard_price') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf90a0e1954c0> = {'allow_custom_mrp': True, 'base_price': 25.0, 'category': 'Premium', 'cogs_components_values': {'air_water_label_cost': 2.8, 'bird_logo_cost': 2.5, 'cap': 4.0, 'manufacturing_variable_cost': 20.0, ...}, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_209_proposal_pdf.py:123: in test_update_master_sku_standard_price_and_credit assert float(updated.get("standard_price") or 0) == 120.0 E AssertionError: assert 0.0 == 120.0 E + where 0.0 = float((None or 0)) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf90a0e1954c0>('standard_price') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf90a0e1954c0> = {'allow_custom_mrp': True, 'base_price': 25.0, 'category': 'Premium', 'cogs_components_values': {'air_water_label_cost': 2.8, 'bird_logo_cost': 2.5, 'cap': 4.0, 'manufacturing_variable_cost': 20.0, ...}, ...}.get
